calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73129750 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73129750 -maxdepth 5 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73129750 --event evt-petition-disposition\nfind data/cases/scotus/73129750 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys' data/cases/scotus/73129750/record/snapshots/2026-07-14.json\njq 'to_entries[] | {key: .key, type: (.value|type), length: (if (.value|type)==\"array\" or (.value|type)==\"object\" then (.value|length) else null end)}' data/cases/scotus/73129750/record/snapshots/2026-07-14.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A45 -B5 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|relist|CVSG|First Circuit|certiorari before judgment\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 260\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^I\\.|^II\\.|^III\\.|REASONS FOR DENYING|independent|certiorari before judgment|vehicle|Washington|unanim|extraordinary|urgency|conflict|moot\" data/cases/scotus/73129750/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\ngit status --short -- data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z\nfind data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73129750",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260714T120628Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq empty data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z/*.json\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git status --short\nfind data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\\n' | sort\nwc -c data/cases/scotus/73129750/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260714T120628Z/*","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output)
